base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ninpo_windmill — a projectile from 1988 ninja gaiden. Windmill Throwing Star — boomerangs back to Ryu. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Windmill Throwing Star — boomerangs back to Ryu
